name: Click in Place 20.7qt Open Front Plastic Storage Bin for Home and Office Organization Green Tint - Brightroom™
description:
Organize your home essentials in style with this 20.7-Quart Open-Front Bin from Brightroom™. This storage bin features a spacious silhouette for storing anything from toys to books and beyond. The open front allows for easy access to the contents, while the clear construction allows for easy identification of the contents. Plus, the two integrated side handles make carrying it a breeze.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
